title: Super Mario Galaxy Hit a Billion-Dollar High Score

blocks.content: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie just scored a power-up two months after its release. Cue the music! The video-game film just passed the $1 billion mark at the global box office, Variety reports. It’s now the 16th-highest-grossing animated film globally. Mario Galaxy is the highest-grossing movie of the year and the only one to hit that milestone with Michael following closely behind at $888 million globally. So it won’t be the only one at the top for much longer. The success of Mario Galaxy followed a similar trajectory to that of its predecessor, Super Mario Bros. The first film closed out its box-office run with $1.36 billion in global ticket sales and was the highest-grossing animated film of 2023, behind only Barbie in the overall global box office.

Given this box-office success, it’s no surprise that Illumination/Nintendo are finding new ways to expand the franchise. Jack Black accidentally revealed that there are already plans for a third movie, in addition to plans for a Donkey Kong Country film in 2028. Turns out there’s plenty of room in the galaxy for more movies.
